summary: Completed testing of 3 new features in Reports page: 1) Credit collection (تحصيل الآجل) with POST /api/reports/credit/collect endpoint, 2) Delivery tab updated to show 5 stat cards with collection tracking, 3) Sales tab shows 3 new cards (Materials Cost, Packaging Cost, Net Profit). All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified all features display correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: POST /api/reports/credit/collect endpoint (lines 834-896 in reports_routes.py) correctly creates collection records and updates order status when fully collected
Code review passed: POST /api/reports/delivery/collect endpoint (lines 947-988 in reports_routes.py) correctly creates delivery collection records
Code review passed: GET /api/reports/sales (lines 20-148) returns total_packaging_cost and total_materials_cost fields
Code review passed: GET /api/reports/delivery-credits (lines 450-565) returns 5 required fields: total_sales, total_commission, net_receivable, total_collected, total_remaining
Code review passed: GET /api/reports/credit (lines 764-823) returns orders with collected_amount, remaining_amount, and is_fully_collected fields
Code review passed: Frontend CreditReportTab component (lines 779-1022) displays collect button for uncollected orders with proper dialog
Code review passed: Frontend DeliveryReportTab component (lines 1024-1305) displays 5 stat cards and collect button per delivery company
Code review passed: Frontend Sales tab (lines 1773-1811) displays 3 new cards: Materials Cost, Packaging Cost, Net Profit
seed_data_creation: Created test delivery collection record during integration test (delivery_app_id: test_integration_app)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page features verified: 1) Credit collection API and UI working - POST /api/reports/credit/collect creates collection records, GET /api/reports/credit returns orders with collection tracking fields, UI shows collect button in Action column. 2) Delivery tab shows 5 stat cards (before/after deduction, collected, remaining) and collect button per company - POST /api/reports/delivery/collect creates records. 3) Sales tab shows 3 new cards (Materials Cost, Packaging Cost, Net Profit). Note: No actual credit or delivery orders exist in current date range, but API structure and UI components verified.
